For the one who reads this letter:
I am writing this in the year 1002,
it's the 800 year anniversary of our glorious Kingdom.
What a time to be alive!
I'm unsure if I can stay much longer.
My heart is failing me and my legs are weak, I
doubt I can keep this up much longer.
But I am glad that I was alive to see this.
May peace, prosperity and happiness come upon us
May war and violence become mere history.
